title: prostanthera calycina
intro: Prostanthera calycina, also known as the coastal mint bush, is a shrub native to Australia and part of the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Prostanthera calycina include relief from digestive issues, colds, and sore throats, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems. Prostanthera calycina can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, essential oil, and infusions, which can be used topically or ingested for medicinal purposes.
